Matches.VideoName: Individual Race - Stage 3 - Menyuan - Huzhu Live
Matches.Description: Watch the Tour of Magnificent Qinghai 2026 live online on tapmad. The event brings together elite cyclists competing across challenging mountain terrain, scenic road stages, and exciting sprint finishes in one of Asia's premier cycling races. Catch every stage live in HD on tapmad via app, web, or smart TV and stay updated with official race coverage and event highlights.

Matches.CategoryName: New Zealand Tour of West Indies 2026
Matches.Description: The 2nd ODI of the New Zealand Tour of West Indies 2026 marks the start of a five match Odi series. Watch New Zealand vs West Indies 2nd Odi live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, West Indies look to capitalize on home conditions with a balanced lineup, while New Zealand aim to deliver disciplined performances through a well-rounded unit capable of competing in all phases of the game.
